get_diff.summary:
+ Added rate limiting middleware
+ Added tests for rate limiter
- Removed legacy throttle helper

draft_pr.title: feat: add rate limiting middleware
draft_pr.body:
## What

Adds a rate limiting middleware to cap requests per IP.

## Why

Prevents abuse and protects downstream services.

## Changes

- `src/middleware/rate-limit.js` — new middleware
- `test/rate-limit.test.js` — unit tests
- Removed legacy `throttle.js`
draft_pr.slack_message: PR #99 open: feat: add rate limiting middleware — https://github.com/acme/backend/pull/99
draft_pr.notion_content: Opened PR #99 feat: add rate limiting middleware on 2026-04-12. Adds per-IP rate limiting and removes legacy throttle helper.
